productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Taisoku Casual Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for everyday wear, the puma range of everyday sneakers embodies excitement and energy for life. The Taisoku comes with a comfy slip on style and a durable design - making it a great buy. Product Details Black round toed synthetic upper with a slip on styling Has elasticated toggle straps for lacing under a midfoot strap with a Velcro closure Padded inner Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with terraced grooves and a suction point at the mound of the big toe and the ball of the heel Material and Care Synthetic, leather Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
